title: Graf Porno und die liebesdurstigen Töchter
original_title: Graf Porno und die liebesdurstigen Töchter
overview: Garibaldus lives in the family inherited castle, but with the finances he has problems. To solve their financial problems, he wants to marry his son to a rich girl.
